summary: Repaired the deterministic validation failure by quarantining the four validator-identified security-sensitive PRs with exact-ref route_security actions. PR #88323 remains a non-mutating maintainer-review item because it was not flagged by the validator and has unresolved bot/check blockers. No shared canonical was selected, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or permitted for this live inventory shard.
